summary: Comprehensive testing of Wallet Credit Pipeline and Story Generator Image Display. All 19 backend API tests passed (2 skipped). Story Generator images (coverImageUrl and scene.imageUrl) displaying correctly. Wallet endpoints fully functional with HOLD/CAPTURE/RELEASE pattern.
critical_code_review_comments: Wallet credit reservation pattern (HOLD/CAPTURE/RELEASE) implemented correctly with atomic operations
Story image generation using Gemini gemini-3-pro-image-preview model for cover and first scene
Images stored in /tmp and served via /api/generate/story-image/{story_id}/{filename}
Idempotency protection working with Idempotency-Key header for duplicate request prevention
Credit ledger tracks all transactions with proper status (ACTIVE, CAPTURED, RELEASED)
Job cancellation properly releases reserved credits back to available balance
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet credit pipeline fully functional with job creation, cancellation, and ledger tracking. Story Generator generates AI images for cover (coverImageUrl) and first scene (scene.imageUrl) using Gemini. Images served via /api/generate/story-image/ endpoint.

WALLET_GET_ME.details: Returns userId, balanceCredits, reservedCredits, availableCredits. Available = Balance - Reserved

WALLET_GET_PRICING.details: Returns all 7 job types: TEXT_TO_IMAGE (10), TEXT_TO_VIDEO (25+), IMAGE_TO_VIDEO (20+), VIDEO_REMIX (15), STORY_GENERATION (10), REEL_GENERATION (10), STYLE_PROFILE_CREATE (20)

JOB_CREATION.details: Creates job with QUEUED status, reserves credits atomically

IDEMPOTENCY_PROTECTION.details: Duplicate request with same Idempotency-Key returns existing job with duplicate:true

JOB_STATUS.details: Returns jobId, status, jobType, costCredits, createdAt, outputUrl

JOB_CANCEL.details: Releases reserved credits, sets status to CANCELLED

CREDIT_LEDGER.details: Shows HOLD/RELEASE entries with summary totals

LEDGER_HOLD_ENTRY.details: HOLD entry created when job is created, status=ACTIVE

LEDGER_RELEASE_ENTRY.details: RELEASE entry created when job is cancelled, includes reason

JOB_LISTING.details: Lists jobs with filtering by status and job_type

STORY_COVER_IMAGE.details: coverImageUrl present in story result, displays correctly with data-testid='story-cover-image'

STORY_SCENE_IMAGE.details: First scene has imageUrl, displays with data-testid='scene-image-0'

mocked_apis.note: Real Gemini AI used for text and image generation

screenshots_taken: story_result_full.png - Generated story with cover image
